com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface ISecurityProfileExternalModule

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    SecurityProfileExternalModule

    public interface ISecurityProfileExternalModule
    Interface of description of an allowed external module of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster

      Gets external module description

      Gets external module name
